articles.title: Funcience Expands Industrial Chip Portfolio with New EtherCAT and DSP Solutions
articles.summary: Funcience announces expansion of its industrial automation chip portfolio, introducing new EtherCAT slave controllers and DSP processors designed for high-performance motion control and industrial communication applications.
articles.content:
Beijing Funcience Semiconductor Co., Ltd. has announced the expansion of its industrial chip portfolio with new products targeting the growing demand for domestic industrial automation solutions. The new offerings include enhanced EtherCAT slave controllers and high-performance DSP processors designed to meet the stringent requirements of modern industrial applications.

The expanded portfolio addresses key market needs including high-speed real-time communication, precision motor control, and reliable operation in harsh industrial environments. All products are designed as pin-compatible alternatives to international standards, enabling easy migration and supply chain diversification.

'We are committed to providing world-class industrial chips that meet the evolving needs of our customers,' said a Funcience spokesperson. 'Our expanded portfolio demonstrates our continued investment in R&D and our dedication to the industrial automation market.'

The new products are available through authorized distributors including LiTong Electronics, with comprehensive technical support and development tools.

articles.title: Funcience Achieves Major Production Milestone for Industrial Ethernet Chips
articles.summary: Funcience announces successful mass production of its FCE1100 and FCE1353 EtherCAT slave controllers, marking a significant milestone in domestic industrial chip manufacturing.
articles.content:
Funcience has announced the successful mass production of its FCE1100 and FCE1353 EtherCAT slave controller chips, achieving a major milestone in the development of domestic industrial Ethernet solutions. The production ramp follows extensive validation and qualification testing.

The FCE1100 and FCE1353 have been qualified for industrial temperature ranges and have demonstrated excellent reliability in customer applications. Mass production enables Funcience to meet growing demand from industrial automation equipment manufacturers seeking domestic alternatives to imported chips.

'Reaching mass production is a critical step in our mission to provide reliable domestic industrial chips,' said Funcience's production director. 'Our manufacturing partners have demonstrated excellent quality control, ensuring consistent product performance.'

The production milestone comes as many industrial equipment manufacturers are diversifying their supply chains. Funcience's products offer pin-compatible alternatives to established international standards, enabling seamless integration into existing designs.

LiTong Electronics, as an authorized distributor, maintains inventory of production volumes to support customer demand with fast delivery times.

articles.title: Funcience DSP Processors Demonstrate Excellence in Motor Control Applications
articles.summary: Funcience's FCP32C335 DSP processor demonstrates superior performance in motor control applications, offering a compelling alternative to established international solutions.
articles.content:
Recent application testing has demonstrated that Funcience's FCP32C335 DSP processor delivers excellent performance in demanding motor control applications. The chip's 150MHz C28x core and 150ps HRPWM resolution enable precise control of servo motors and variable frequency drives.

Testing conducted by industrial drive manufacturers showed that the FCP32C335 achieves control performance equivalent to or exceeding competing solutions in key metrics including torque ripple, dynamic response, and position accuracy. The pin-compatible design with TMS320F28335 enables easy migration for existing designs.

'The FCP32C335 has exceeded our expectations in servo drive applications,' reported one customer. 'The HRPWM resolution provides noticeably smoother operation at low speeds, and the migration from our previous solution was straightforward.'

Funcience provides comprehensive motor control libraries including FOC algorithms, BLDC control, and digital power solutions. Reference designs and evaluation kits accelerate customer development cycles.

The FCP32C335 is available now through LiTong Electronics with local technical support.

articles.title: Funcience and LiTong Electronics Strengthen Partnership for Industrial Chip Distribution
articles.summary: Funcience and LiTong Electronics announce expanded partnership to provide comprehensive distribution and technical support for Funcience's industrial automation chip portfolio.
articles.content:
Funcience and LiTong Electronics have announced an expanded partnership to strengthen the distribution and support of Funcience's industrial chip products in the market. The partnership combines Funcience's innovative chip designs with LiTong's extensive distribution network and technical expertise.

Under the expanded agreement, LiTong Electronics serves as an authorized distributor for Funcience's complete product portfolio including EtherCAT slave controllers, DSP processors, and industrial Ethernet PHYs. LiTong provides local inventory, technical support, and application engineering services.

'This partnership enables us to better serve our customers with local support and fast delivery,' said a Funcience representative. 'LiTong's technical expertise in industrial applications complements our chip design capabilities.'

LiTong Electronics maintains inventory of popular Funcience products and offers value-added services including BOM optimization, reference design support, and application guidance. Customers benefit from shorter lead times and local language technical support.

The partnership supports the growing demand for domestic industrial chips as manufacturers seek to diversify their supply chains and reduce dependence on imported components.

articles.title: Funcience Releases Enhanced Development Tools and Reference Designs
articles.summary: Funcience announces release of enhanced development tools, evaluation kits, and reference designs to accelerate customer development cycles for industrial automation applications.
articles.content:
Funcience has released an updated suite of development tools and reference designs to help customers accelerate their product development cycles. The enhanced offerings include new evaluation kits, software libraries, and application-specific reference designs.

New evaluation kits are available for the FCE1100, FCE1353, and FCP32C335, providing complete hardware and software platforms for product evaluation. The kits include fully assembled boards, sample code, configuration tools, and comprehensive documentation.

Updated software libraries include optimized motor control algorithms, EtherCAT slave stack implementations, and peripheral drivers. The libraries are compatible with popular development environments and include extensive examples.

New reference designs demonstrate best practices for common applications including servo drives, industrial I/O modules, and motor control systems. The designs include schematics, PCB layouts, and BOMs that can be adapted for production.

'Our goal is to make it as easy as possible for customers to integrate our chips into their products,' said Funcience's applications engineering manager. 'These enhanced tools significantly reduce development time and risk.'

The development tools are available now through LiTong Electronics.
